languages.text: "Я вижу глубину раскаяния Его Преосвященства и готов{mf||а} помочь принять его. Надеюсь, Император смилостивится над его душой".
languages.translation_comment:
Запускается этюд VP_CardinalPenance
Оставляем кардинала в живых — он уходит на свою личную казнь
Весы направо

languages.text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."
languages.original_text: "Я вижу глубину раскаяния Его Преосвященства и готов{mf||а} помочь принять его. Надеюсь, Император смилостивится над его душой".

traits.locale_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."
"I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

Весы направо

languages.text: "Ich sehe die aufrichtige Reue Seiner Eminenz und bin bereit, sie zu unterstützen. Möge der Imperator seiner Seele gnädig sein."
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe die aufrichtige Reue Seiner Eminenz und bin bereit, sie zu unterstützen. Möge der Imperator seiner Seele gnädig sein."

languages.text: « La contrition de Son Éminence me paraît évidente, aussi suis-je {mf|prêt|prête} à l'aider à en convaincre le peuple. J'espère que l'Empereur aura pitié de son âme. »
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: « La contrition de Son Éminence me paraît évidente, aussi suis-je {mf|prêt|prête} à l'aider à en convaincre le peuple. J'espère que l'Empereur aura pitié de son âme. »

languages.text: “这位主教的决心让我深受感动。我愿意协助他完成最后的赎罪，愿帝皇宽恕他的灵魂。”
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: “这位主教的决心让我深受感动。我愿意协助他完成最后的赎罪，愿帝皇宽恕他的灵魂。”

languages.text: «Veo el arrepentimiento en el alma de su eminencia y le ayudaré a aceptarlo. Espero que el Emperador se apiade de su alma».
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: «Veo el arrepentimiento en el alma de su eminencia y le ayudaré a aceptarlo. Espero que el Emperador se apiade de su alma».

languages.text: 「猊下の悔恨の念の深さを目の当たりにし、その受諾に向けて喜んで協力する。皇帝陛下が彼の魂に慈悲を与えてくださることを願っている」
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: 「猊下の悔恨の念の深さを目の当たりにし、その受諾に向けて喜んで協力する。皇帝陛下が彼の魂に慈悲を与えてくださることを願っている」

languages.text: "Sayın Kardinal'in samimi pişmanlığının derinliğini görüyor ve talebinin kabulüne razı oluyorum. İmparator ruhuna merhamet eylesin."
languages.original_text: "I see the depth of His Eminence's contrition and am willing to help toward its acceptance. I hope the Emperor has mercy on his soul."

traits.locale_text: "Sayın Kardinal'in samimi pişmanlığının derinliğini görüyor ve talebinin kabulüne razı oluyorum. İmparator ruhuna merhamet eylesin."
